# Sniper Duels Auto Shop

> The first fully automated item shop for Sniper Duels on Roblox. Purchase gems, items, and crates with automatic 24/7 delivery.

## About

Sniper Duels Auto Shop is an independent third-party marketplace for the Roblox game Sniper Duels. We provide automated delivery of in-game items including snipers, knives, crates, and gems. Our bot-powered system completes trades within 2 minutes, 24 hours a day.

## Products

- **Snipers**: Ranged weapons with various rarity tiers (Uncommon, Rare, Legendary, Epic, Secret, Collectible). Some include FX effects and Fragtrak stat tracking.
- **Knives**: Melee weapons with rarity tiers and optional FX effects.
- **Crates**: Mystery crates containing random items of varying rarity.
- **Gems**: In-game currency sold in bulk. Pricing: $2.90/k for 1k-99k, $2.65/k for 100k+.

## How It Works

1. Log in with your Roblox account (OAuth — we never see your password)
2. Browse and select items or gems
3. Pay securely through Pandabase (credit/debit cards)
4. Join our private Roblox server via the provided link
5. Accept the automated bot trade — items delivered in under 2 minutes

## Pricing

- Items: Priced individually based on rarity and demand
- Gems: $2.90 per 1,000 (1k-99k orders), $2.65 per 1,000 (100k+ orders)
- Loyalty discounts: Silver tier (0.5% off after $100 spent), Gold tier (1% off after $250 spent)
- Discord link bonus: One-time 2.5% discount on first purchase
